title: AnyLLM Model Integration
interaction_flow_get_response: Caller → AnyLLMModel: get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt)
AnyLLMModel → AnyLLMModel: _selected_api() — checks self.api override or calls _supports_responses()
AnyLLMModel → AnyLLMModel: _get_provider() — calls AnyLLM.create(provider_name, api_key, api_base), caches by retry-flag
AnyLLMModel: _get_provider() checks should_disable_provider_managed_retries(); if true → _clone_provider_without_retries() sets max_retries=0
_fetch_responses_response → AnyLLMModel: _sanitize_any_llm_responses_input(list_input) — strips None fields, provider_data, FAKE_RESPONSES_IDs
AnyLLMModel: builds Usage from response.usage (input/output/total tokens)
AnyLLMModel → Caller: return ModelResponse(output=response.output, usage, response_id=response.id)
_fetch_chat_response: inserts system message if system_instructions present
_fetch_chat_response → Converter: convert_tool_choice(), convert_response_format(), tool_to_openai() per tool, convert_handoff_tool() per handoff
_fetch_chat_response → AnyLLMProviderInstance: acompletion(model=provider_model, messages, tools, temperature, top_p, ...stream=False...)
AnyLLMModel → AnyLLMModel: _normalize_any_llm_message(message) — normalizes tool_calls, extracts reasoning_content
AnyLLMModel: builds Usage from response.usage (prompt/completion tokens)
AnyLLMModel → Caller: return ModelResponse(output=items, usage, response_id=None)
interaction_flow_stream_response: Caller → AnyLLMModel: stream_response(...) — same params as get_response
AnyLLMModel: iterates stream chunks, detects ResponseCompletedEvent to capture final_response
AnyLLMModel → Caller: yields each ResponseStreamEvent chunk
AnyLLMModel → AnyLLMModel: _fetch_chat_response(..., stream=True) — returns (Response shell, AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionChunk])
AnyLLMModel → AnyLLMModel: _normalize_chat_stream(stream) — normalizes each chunk, extracts reasoning text
AnyLLMModel → Caller: yields each TResponseStreamEvent from ChatCmplStreamHandler

routing_logic._selected_api: Returns 'responses' if provider.SUPPORTS_RESPONSES=True (or user forced api='responses'), else 'chat_completions'. Raises UserError if user forces 'responses' on unsupported provider.
routing_logic.model_name_format: 'provider/model' — split on first '/'. If no '/', defaults provider to 'openai'. E.g. 'openrouter/openai/gpt-5.4-mini' → provider='openrouter', model='openai/gpt-5.4-mini'
routing_logic.provider_cache: Cached by retry-flag (bool). Base provider created via AnyLLM.create(). Retry-disabled clone created via copy() + client.with_options(max_retries=0).
routing_logic.responses_transport_path: If extra_headers/query/body present, uses private provider._aresponses(ResponsesParams, **transport_kwargs). Otherwise uses public provider.aresponses().
routing_logic.prompt_support: prompt-managed requests are NOT supported; immediately raises UserError on both chat and responses paths.

key_relationships: AnyLLMProvider extends ModelProvider; creates AnyLLMModel via get_model()
AnyLLMModel depends_on AnyLLM (any-llm SDK) via importlib lazy import
AnyLLMModel depends_on Converter (chatcmpl_converter) for chat path message/tool conversion
AnyLLMModel depends_on OpenAIResponsesConverter for responses path tool/format conversion
AnyLLMModel depends_on ChatCmplStreamHandler for streaming chat chunks → response events
AnyLLMModel depends_on get_openai_retry_advice for retry guidance
AnyLLMModel depends_on should_disable_provider_managed_retries for retry runtime control
AnyLLMModel uses response_span / generation_span for tracing (disabled when ModelTracing.DISABLED)
important_notes: Model name MUST be 'provider/model' format; no '/' defaults to 'openai' provider.
Responses API path: preserves previous_response_id and conversation_id (stateful sessions). Chat path does NOT (response_id=None).

Input sanitization (_sanitize_any_llm_responses_input) strips: provider_data fields, null/None values, FAKE_RESPONSES_ID ids, and drops full reasoning items with provider_data (cross-adapter replay safety).
Anthropic/Claude/Gemini models get extra fix_tool_message_ordering() applied to converted messages.
Streaming chat path builds a fake Response shell (id=FAKE_RESPONSES_ID) before delegating to ChatCmplStreamHandler.
Provider is lazily created and cached; aclose() propagates to underlying SDK client.
Reasoning content extracted via _extract_any_llm_reasoning_text() supporting reasoning_content, reasoning.content, thinking attributes.
Non-OpenAI ChatCompletion payloads (dict or generic BaseModel) are normalized via model_validate before processing.
